text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few months have passed since Mayano's debut.
While training like usual...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yukino? Are you all right? Why don't you take
five?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I'm right as rain! I can keep goin', ya know!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I wanna catch ya! Ev'ry sec'nd counts!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I see. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: In that case, let's do another lap.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It's nothing! Absolutely nothing...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says it's nothing, but that heavy sigh
indicates otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Something else? You mean, like... go on a date?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Give me one minute to get ready! A date
with Trainer! Yaaay! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I wonder what it's like to go on a
grown-up date. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we head out. Speaking of a place that
will cheer her up...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The last stop on our date has to be the place
where I twinkle the most!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's only one place it could be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: This is...
choice_data_list: The place where you twinkle the most.
The place where you twinkle the most.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Do you still think so? Even now?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What if I said I'm beginning to doubt that? Would
you get angry?
choice_data_list: Why the sudden change of tune?
Why the sudden change of tune?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I used to think that being able to run in a real
race would be so exciting.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I mean, all the racers are so twinkly, you know?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's why I always looked forward to running—in
my debut race and all my other races too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But when I finally ran those races, it was...
different from what I thought.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I felt like, "Oh, so this is what racing is. It's kind of
boring."

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I know I shouldn't say things like that.
I'm aware of it, but...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No matter what I do, it's so boring.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
choice_data_list: I've heard that's a good thing!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So far, she's only run in the debut-level races of
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And she just isn't satisfied with racing at this
level. All that means is that she has to set her
sights on the next level.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her chance to face stronger opponents will come.
There are races she hasn't experienced yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So if she's just worried about feeling bored right
now...
choice_data_list: We should try to have more fun from now on!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...More fun?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Can we do that? I told you, I'm—
choice_data_list: I'm going to do my best to help you twinkle.
I'm going to do my best to help you twinkle.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I know that she'll shine in a way that only she can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since I was able to become the trainer of a racer
as naturally gifted as Mayano Top Gun...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's my duty to put her in races where she can use
that talent and improve her unique abilities.
